posts.title: What is Blockchain: Everything You Need to Know (2022)
posts.summary: If you want to pay online, you need to register an account and provide credit card information. If you don't have a credit card, you can pay with bank transfer. With the rise of cryptocurrencies, these methods may become old. Imagine a world in which you can do transactions and many other things without having to give your personal information. A world in which you don’t need to rely on banks or governments anymore. Sounds amazing, right? That’s exactly what blockchain technology allows us to do. It’s like your computer’s hard drive. blockchain is a technology that lets you store data in…
